meaning: n.鎮插墽婕斿憳,鎮插墽浣滃
examples: She is regared as the best tragedian on the English stage.
The performance heightened my admiration for the tragedian.
She is regarded as the best tragedian on the English stage.
Daughter of a well-known tragedian, Priscilla Cooper had gone on the stage herself at 17.
